subcodes.title: Words to Miss Pearson in Akka, 1899-02-26
subcodes.first_line: One thing I ask of you for your own good, and that you must do if you wish to gain the blessing.
subcodes.subjects: @power of faith; power of the spirit, @Mary Magdalene, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
